name: compliance-specialist subagent: frontmatter declares both prompt_id and prompt_version (§2.3)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-subagent-frontmatter.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-compliance.md" --field prompt_id --present && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-subagent-frontmatter.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/review-compliance.md" --field prompt_version --present && echo ok 1>&2
